meaning: adj.书籍解题的,著书目录的
examples: One was the NISO Webinar on Bibliographic Control.
Another, bibliographic focused, experiment can be found at semanticlibrary.org.
It was to harbor drawers brimming with reference books, microfilm and bibliographic CARDS.
Commerce's proposal includes transferring NTIS' paper, microfiche and digital collection and bibliographic database to the Library of Congress.
At first blush, bibliographic data seems like it would be a fairly straightforward thing: author, title, publisher, publication date.
